classes.reasoning: This is a formal distribution cover letter from the sponsor to investigators regarding the release of Investigator Brochure Edition 2, including mandatory acknowledgement requirements. It is a TMF document that does not fit other specific classes—it is administrative correspondence documenting IB distribution and receipt.

summary: This is a cover letter from Biorce Therapeutics dated 15 October 2023 distributing Investigator Brochure Edition 2 for BRC-471 (Lumitanib) to all principal investigators and sub-investigators on study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. The letter highlights critical updates including new Phase II efficacy data, an updated ILD/pneumonitis safety signal requiring immediate action, new drug-drug interaction data with CYP3A4 inhibitors, and includes a mandatory acknowledgement form that must be returned within 14 days before enrolling new patients.
references_to: Investigator Brochure Edition 2 for BRC-471 (Lumitanib), dated 15 October 2023
